title: avena coarctata
intro: Avena coarctata is a perennial grass species in the genus Avena, commonly known as oat grass, which is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a diuretic. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing inflammation, reducing anxiety, and supporting healthy digestion, due to its saponin and flavonoid content. Avena coarctata is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal use, and can also be consumed as an oat-based food supplement.
